    What Actually Happens in the Second After You Say Hello to an AI Telephony, WebRTC, voice detection, transcription. A month building it from scratch, and where that second actually goes.

    I Cloned a ₹20,000 Light Setup for Under ₹2,000 How I built a real-time TV backlight that syncs colors with what's on screen, for less than the cost of a decent dinner.

    Your Dream Retirement Costs 3,000 Euros. You Can Take It Now. 4 ideas from Tim Ferriss that killed my 'someday' list.

    I Checked the Math on a Shawshank Escape. It Checks Out. 7 lessons from a month of rabbit holes: prison physics, Paul Graham schedules, Stanford energy hacks, and why your iPhone is lying to you.

    I Shipped a Neovim Plugin in Lua. I Don't Know Lua. The actual workflow: use AI as the Lua specialist, yourself as the architect, and your engineering instincts to catch what the AI can't.

    I Did the Math on My Spotify Obsession. I'm Spotify's Problem. A proper cost model for Indian subscribers — marginal royalty, fully-loaded overhead, break-even analysis, and what 100k+ minutes/year actually means for Spotify's P&L.
